item.title: AI Developer Radar｜Daily｜2026-06-22 - Today's Summary
[sudden_breakout] automazeio/ccpm (+7 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: AI Agent Framework Description: CCPM is an Agent Skill that turns AI coding agents into structured project managers using GitHub Issues and parallel Git worktrees for spec-driven, multi-agent development. Why it matters: With 8,166 stars, a 7-day average delta of 2.4, and a sudden acceleration to 2.4 (high), CCPM is experiencing a breakout. The 24-hour delta of 4 and 7-day delta of 17 indicate sustained, accelerating interest. This is not a flash spike but a rapidly growing project with strong community signals. Developer insight: This signals a shift from ad-hoc AI coding to disciplined, spec-driven development. The emphasis on 'no vibe coding' and full traceability suggests that the next frontier for AI coding tools is not just code generation but project management and accountability. Developers should watch for similar patterns in other tools. Risk: Medium

item.title: [sustained_hot] chopratejas/headroom (+3096 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Coding Agent / SWE Agent Description: Compress tool outputs, logs, files, and RAG chunks before they reach the LLM. 60-95% fewer tokens, same answers. Library, proxy, MCP server. Why it matters: Coding Agent / SWE Agent 方向保持持续热门，24h stars +3096，总 stars 45,038，适合看近期 release、commit 或社区讨论是否解释了增长。 Developer insight: 关注它如何拆解代码任务、接入工具和处理仓库上下文，可作为 coding agent 产品能力参考。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] mukul975/Anthropic-Cybersecurity-Skills (+6742 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Coding Agent / SWE Agent Description: 754 structured cybersecurity skills for AI agents · Mapped to 5 frameworks: MITRE ATT&CK, NIST CSF 2.0, MITRE ATLAS, D3FEND & NIST AI RMF · agentskills.io standard · Works with Claude Code, GitHub Copilot, Codex CLI, Cursor, Gemini CLI & 20+ platforms · 26 security domains · Apache 2.0 Why it matters: Coding Agent / SWE Agent 方向保持持续热门，24h stars +6742，总 stars 17,877，适合看近期 release、commit 或社区讨论是否解释了增长。 Developer insight: 关注它如何拆解代码任务、接入工具和处理仓库上下文，可作为 coding agent 产品能力参考。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] Panniantong/Agent-Reach (+1174 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: MCP / Tool Calling Description: Agent Reach is a CLI tool that gives AI agents zero-config access to read and search Twitter, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub, Bilibili, Xiaohongshu, and more — all free, no API fees. Why it matters: The repo exploded from 31,787 stars with a 24h delta of +2,809 and a 7-day delta of +7,284. The acceleration ratio is 3.3 (high), indicating a sudden breakout. This is a massive spike in attention, likely driven by viral sharing in AI developer communities. Developer insight: This signals a shift toward 'capability layers' that abstract away the complexity of platform-specific access. Instead of each agent reinventing the wheel for web scraping, a shared open-source layer can handle authentication, backend selection, and fallback routing. This pattern may become standard for agent infrastructure. Risk: Low

item.title: [sudden_breakout] ZhuLinsen/daily_stock_analysis (+1310 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: AI Agent Framework Description: LLM 驱动的多市场股票智能分析系统：多源行情、实时新闻、决策看板与自动推送，支持零成本定时运行。 LLM-powered multi-market stock analysis system with multi-source market data, real-time news, decision dashboard, automated notifications, and cost-free scheduled runs. Why it matters: AI Agent Framework 方向出现突然加速：24h stars +1310，前 3 日均值 191.7，加速度 6.8x，今天值得优先排查触发原因。 Developer insight: 可以用一个最小样例验证 API、文档和集成成本，再决定是否纳入长期技术观察。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] DeusData/codebase-memory-mcp (+1209 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: MCP / Tool Calling Description: High-performance code intelligence MCP server. Indexes codebases into a persistent knowledge graph — average repo in milliseconds. 158 languages, sub-ms queries, 99% fewer tokens. Single static binary, zero dependencies. Why it matters: MCP / Tool Calling 方向保持持续热门，24h stars +1209，总 stars 10,593，适合看近期 release、commit 或社区讨论是否解释了增长。 Developer insight: 重点看协议适配、工具注册和真实示例，判断它是否能降低 agent 接工具的成本。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sudden_breakout] topoteretes/cognee (+456 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: AI Agent Framework Description: Cognee is the open-source AI memory platform for agents. Give your AI agents persistent long-term memory across sessions with a self-hosted knowledge graph engine. Why it matters: AI Agent Framework 方向出现突然加速：24h stars +456，前 3 日均值 160.3，加速度 2.8x，今天值得优先排查触发原因。 Developer insight: 可以用一个最小样例验证 API、文档和集成成本，再决定是否纳入长期技术观察。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sudden_breakout] esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix (+302 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Coding Agent / SWE Agent Description: DeepSeek-native AI coding agent for your terminal. Engineered around prefix-cache stability — leave it running. Why it matters: Coding Agent / SWE Agent 方向出现突然加速：24h stars +302，前 3 日均值 142.3，加速度 2.1x，今天值得优先排查触发原因。 Developer insight: 关注它如何拆解代码任务、接入工具和处理仓库上下文，可作为 coding agent 产品能力参考。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sudden_breakout] asgeirtj/system_prompts_leaks (+713 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Coding Agent / SWE Agent Description: Extracted system prompts from Anthropic - Claude Fable 5, Opus 4.8, Claude Code, Claude Design. OpenAI - ChatGPT 5.5 Thinking, GPT 5.5 Instant, Codex. Google - Gemini 3.5 Flash, 3.1 Pro, Antigravity. xAI - Grok, Cursor, Copilot, VS Code, Perplexity, and more. Updated regularly. Why it matters: Coding Agent / SWE Agent 方向出现突然加速：24h stars +713，前 3 日均值 257，加速度 2.8x，今天值得优先排查触发原因。 Developer insight: 关注它如何拆解代码任务、接入工具和处理仓库上下文，可作为 coding agent 产品能力参考。 Risk: Low

item.description: Category: Coding Agent / SWE Agent Description: 🎨 Local-first, open-source Claude Design alternative. 🖥️ Native desktop app. ⚡ 259+ Skills · ✨ 142+ Design Systems 🖼️ Web · desktop · mobile prototypes · slides · images · videos · HyperFrames 📦 Sandboxed preview · HTML/PDF/PPTX/MP4 export 🤖 Claude Code / OpenClaw / Codex / Cursor / OpenCode / Qwen / Copilot / Hermes / Kimi & 17+ CLIs.
